channel.title: Tree on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Tree on Arrans github.io

item.title: emirpasic/gods
item.description: GoDS (Go Data Structures) - Sets, Lists, Stacks, Maps, Trees, Queues, and much more

item.title: dtgorski/typex
item.description: [TOOL/CLI] - Filter and examine Go type structures, interfaces and their transitive dependencies and relationships. Export structural types as TypeScript value object or bare type representations.
